start.welcome_new:
Bienvenido a fxBot — la interfaz de clase mundial para f(x) Protocol.

🔐 No custodial. Cero custodia de claves. Automatización sin confianza.

portfolio.title: 📊 Portafolio de {wallet}
portfolio.no_positions:
No hay posiciones activas.

Usa /trade para abrir una posición apalancada o /mint para pedir prestado fxUSD.

trade.preview:
⚡ *Vista previa de operación*

Mercado: {market} {side}
Apalancamiento: {leverage}x
Colateral: {amount} ETH
Deslizamiento: {slippage}%

Toca para confirmar y firmar:

errors.no_wallet: Por favor conecta tu billetera primero con /start
errors.invalid_leverage: El apalancamiento debe estar entre 1.1x y {max}x
errors.rate_limited: Demasiadas solicitudes. Por favor espera un momento.

limit.usage:
Usage: /limit <open|close> <market> <long|short> at <price>

Example: /limit open wstETH long at 2800

orders.title: 🎯 Your Limit Orders
orders.no_orders: No limit orders. Use /limit to place one.

mint.preview:
🏦 *fxMINT Preview*

Collateral: {collateral} {market}
Borrow: {mintAmount} fxUSD

Tap to confirm:

security.title: 🔒 Security Center
security.audits:
*Audits:*
• Trail of Bits (Apr 2024, Jul 2024)
• OpenZeppelin (Aug 2025)
• Secbit (Oct 2025)
security.policies:
*Policies:*
• Zero key custody — keys in Privy TEE
• Automation policy: default-deny, user-revocable
• Daily tx cap: 50

help.title: 📚 fxBot Commands
help.trading:
*Trading:*
/trade — Open leveraged position
/limit — Place limit/stop orders
/orders — View active orders
/mint or /borrow — Borrow fxUSD
/redeem — Redeem fxUSD
/repay — Repay fxUSD debt
help.yield:
*Yield & Governance:*
/save — fxSAVE deposit/withdraw
/lock — Lock FXN → veFXN
/vote — Gauge voting
/claim — Claim rewards
help.portfolio:
*Portfolio:*
/portfolio — View positions
/deposit — Show wallet address + QR
/withdraw — Send to external address
/bridge — Bridge fxUSD
help.settings:
*Settings:*
/settings — Language, slippage, MEV
/security — Policies, audits
/help — This menu
